targets.title: Improve the tracked 7,192-point Sidon set in the 24-cube
targets.why: Accepted state records 7,179 points, and a tracked but unaccepted witness verifies 7,192; useful new evidence must exceed both without repeating the repository discovery.
targets.objective: Produce one explicit Sidon subset of {0,1}^24 with more than 7,192 points. A bounded failure is run evidence only and cannot claim maximality.
